- What changed and why?
- User/business impact:

## Tracking

- Ticket/Issue: <!-- Required. Example: Closes #123 or https://jira.example.com/browse/ABC-123 -->

## Test Plan

- [ ] Local tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed
- [ ] No known regressions introduced

## Workflow Checklist (Required)

- [ ] Branch created from latest `main`
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main` before merge (rebased/updated)
- [ ] Commits are atomic and messages are clear
- [ ] CI checks are green
- [ ] Required reviews requested
- [ ] Rollback plan documented for risky changes
